title: Grip strength test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6n8aq","text":"Protocol for the analyses of grip strength of a rat","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6g3il","text":"This procedure was carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and was approved by the Italian Ministry of Health","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place the rat on a hanging grid to measure the grip strength
Perform three trials to obtain a mean value, then normalize this on animal weight
Leave the rats in the behavioral room for acclimation for at least 1 hour before the test, and perform the marble burying test between 9:00 am and 16:00 pm
creator: Ada Ledonne
